user.title: Connect to CIRIS
user.description: Set up CIRIS AI Assistant connection. You can add context profiles (rooms, languages) after setup.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to CIRIS API

user.title: Create Context Profile
user.description: Configure a context profile for a specific room, user group, or language. Each profile creates a separate conversation agent.

data_description.profile_name: A unique name for this context profile
data_description.preset: Choose a preset to auto-fill settings, or configure manually
data_description.room_type: The type of space this profile is for
data_description.wake_word: Optional custom wake word for this profile
data_description.custom_instructions: Additional instructions for the AI in this context
